summary: Strong PowerShell with good module design & GitHub Actions integration. Issues: Run-ActHarness hardcodes project items (lines 43–44), lacking flexibility if structure changes; workflow's 'Select-Object -Last 1' (pr-label-assigner.yml line 32) assumes JSON on final line only—fragile; missing validation that git/act are installed; tokenization in Convert-GlobToRegex (PRLabeler.psm1) is clever but requires careful reading. Error handling & parameter validation solid elsewhere.
